restaurant.name: Burger Barn
restaurant.orderGreeting: Hi! I'd like to place an order from Burger Barn:

items.name: Classic Smash Burger
items.description: Single patty, American cheese, pickles, secret sauce

items.name: Double Double
items.description: Two patties, two slices of cheese, grilled onions, lettuce, tomato

items.name: BBQ Bacon Burger
items.description: Smoky BBQ sauce, crispy bacon, cheddar, crispy onion strings

items.name: Mushroom Swiss Burger
items.description: Sautéed mushrooms, Swiss cheese, garlic aioli

items.name: Veggie Burger
items.description: House-made black bean patty, avocado, sprouts, chipotle mayo

items.name: French Fries
items.description: Crispy, skin-on, seasoned with sea salt

items.name: Sweet Potato Fries
items.description: Lightly seasoned, served with honey mustard

items.name: Side Salad
items.description: Mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, choice of dressing

items.name: Coleslaw
items.description: Classic creamy style, made fresh daily

items.name: Vanilla Shake
items.description: House-made vanilla ice cream, whole milk, whipped cream

items.name: Chocolate Shake
items.description: Chocolate ice cream, chocolate syrup, whipped cream

items.name: Strawberry Shake
items.description: Fresh strawberries blended in, whipped cream

items.name: Salted Caramel Shake
items.description: Caramel swirl, pretzel bits on top

items.name: Fountain Soda
items.description: Coke, Diet Coke, Sprite, Root Beer, Dr. Pepper

items.name: Soft Serve Cone
items.description: Vanilla or chocolate swirl, cake or sugar cone

items.name: Banana Split
items.description: Three scoops, hot fudge, strawberry, pineapple, whipped cream
